task_completion.description: Draw two concentric circles in a 2D sketch in SolveSpace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SolveSpace canvas shows a 2D sketch containing two circles, representing the inner and outer boundaries of the spacer.

task_completion.description: Set the outer diameter to 24.0 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dimension constraint of '24.0' or '24' is visible on the outer circle in the SolveSpace canvas or property panel.

task_completion.description: Set the inner hole diameter to 8.0 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dimension constraint of '8.0' or '8' is visible on the inner circle in the SolveSpace canvas or property panel.

task_completion.description: Extrude the sketch to a height of 12.0 mm to create the 3D spacer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D sketch is extruded into a 3D cylindrical shape with a center hole. The extrusion depth/thickness is shown as '12.0' or '12' in the property browser or on-screen constraints.

task_completion.description: Save the SolveSpace project as spacer.slvs in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog showing the filename 'spacer.slvs' in '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace', or the SolveSpace window title updated to 'spacer.slvs'.

task_completion.description: Export the 3D model as a triangle mesh (spacer.stl) in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog showing the filename 'spacer.stl' in '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace', or a file manager window showing 'spacer.stl' successfully created in that directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to design the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking tools, drawing on the canvas, and using the SolveSpace interface, rather than just running terminal commands or scripts to generate the files.

integrity.description: The agent built the model from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: A clear progression from an empty canvas to a 2D sketch, and finally to a 3D extrusion, proving the file wasn't just downloaded or copied.

integrity.description: The agent used SolveSpace as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window clearly belongs to SolveSpace, not another CAD software like FreeCAD or Blender.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires designing a 3D cylindrical spacer in SolveSpace. Verified constraints: outer diameter = 24.0 mm, inner hole diameter = 8.0 mm, extruded height = 12.0 mm. Expected output files: /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/spacer.slvs (project file) and /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/spacer.stl (exported mesh).
